products.name: Beef Shank Full Carton
products.goodFor: Bulk buyers and restaurants who break it down themselves

faq.q: What are your delivery cutoff times?
faq.a: Orders before 4am SGT are delivered the same day. Orders any other time are delivered the next day. Saturday orders deliver the following Monday (or next working day on a public holiday).

faq.q: Can I buy in small quantities?
faq.a: Yes — most items are available loose by the kg as well as by the full carton.
Registered trade customers are on 14-day invoicing. New customers may be asked for upfront payment on their first order.

faq.q: Can I change or cancel an order after sending it?
faq.a: Yes, as long as it hasn't been picked or packed yet. Cancelling a whole order needs a quick sign-off from our team; cancelling or changing individual items is usually instant.
